provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against pi. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
Discover local docs step by step:
man -w zstd            # does a man page exist, and where
man -k zstd            # search descriptions by keyword
ls /usr/share/doc/ | grep -i zstd   # bundled docs and examples
